message:
chore: update version metadata

Auto-generated build version and commit information

files.patch:
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 // This file is auto-generated by the build script. Do not edit manually.
 enum Version {
     static let current = "Peekaboo 3.0.0"
-    static let gitCommit = "c702e6b8-dirty"
-    static let gitCommitDate = "2025-11-12 13:06:38 +0000"
+    static let gitCommit = "d3905b97-dirty"
+    static let gitCommitDate = "2025-11-12 14:36:53 +0000"
     static let gitBranch = "main"
-    static let buildDate = "2025-11-12T13:06:47+00:00"
-    
+    static let buildDate = "2025-11-12T14:39:01+00:00"
+
     static var fullVersion: String {
-        return "\(current) (\(gitBranch)/\(gitCommit), built: \(buildDate))"
+        "\(current) (\(gitBranch)/\(gitCommit), built: \(buildDate))"
     }
 }
